title: skopeo copies helm logged in state but helm logout doesn't release creds in skopeo
body:
```sh
helm login <registry>

skopeo list-tags <registry>
# works

helm logout <registry>

skopeo list-tags <registry>
# still works

skopeo logout <registry>

skopeo list-tags <registry>
# does not work now
```

It shouldn't have worked when I logged out of helm

The way it appears to me, `helm login` updates the creds store which is somehow replicated within skopeo when I try to `list-tags`.

But on a helm logout, skopeo continues to retain the credentials somehow (maybe in its own state store?) and so I need to perform an additional `skopeo logout`

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

Skopeo is not making any copy of credentials on a read operation like `skopeo list-tags`, so something else must be going on.

Please run all of the Skopeo commands with `--debug` and provide the logs; and possibly track what files are exactly modified by `helm login` / `helm logout`, and how.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Please reopen if the requested information can be provided.
